message:
refactor: rename GetGroupBead to GetGroupByName for consistent API naming (gt-4p791p.4)

GetGroupBead(name) was confusingly named - it takes a name but did not
indicate that in its method name. Renamed to GetGroupByName(name) to
match the existing GetGroupByID(id) pattern. LookupGroupByName is
kept as-is since its Lookup semantics (with fallback search) are
distinct from the direct Get methods.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
